title: The Elders Hunt the Broadcast
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Sanji, Unknown person #9, Robin, Five Elders as Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
scene: Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What a relief, it's gone...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Guess it wasn't interested in us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hmph... the feeling is mutual...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What in the blue blazes was that monster?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: going off of what we overheard, I think it's one of the five elders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Go figure... what a repulsive transfer- nation!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, why are you still here? Did your new pals leave you high and dry?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd be downright heartbroken if it weren't for your own recent double-cross.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I decided to stay of my own volition.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Someone needed to be here to carry out this final mission.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hang on!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We're just gonna leave Stussy behind?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: There's no helpin' it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That darn barrier has to be lowered the instant the ship attempts its big escape!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And mind you, the Frontier Dome can only be disarmed from the command tower.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: The lady wanted to do it herself.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can only respect that and show our gratitude...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: by getting out of here alive.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course! We won't waste this chance to escape, but!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the thing is, how are we meant to cover the distance that vega-force 01 was originally going to fly us???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THAT'S THE REAL HEAD- SCRATCHER HERE, NICO Robin!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: According to my calculations and all conventional wisdom...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WE'RE 100% GUARANTEED TO CRASH AND BURN!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Serious- Ly?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Guys! I've finished loading the coup de burst!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can take off toward the sea the second zero and the others get onboard!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...If we don't make it, we'll have to improvise and rely on everyone's powers! Let's give it our all!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Aha ha Ha, wowee!! This sure is a rowdy crew.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They say miracles happen 'cause guts triumph over all, and ah love that theory!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Even if ah am a scientist!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Edison!? What are you doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah'm gonna make sure your ship reaches the ocean!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Trust me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Projected damage is 78%!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Edisco- Ooon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Ah ain't dying! Not yet!

summary: This part advances the Vegapunk’s Broadcast through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
